mapper.select: /* SQL ID : BbsCmntDAO.selectBbsCmnt 설 명 : 댓글 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT A WHERE A.ATCL_CMNT_ID = #{cmntId} AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclId} AND A.DELYN = 'N'

choose.when: WITH OPNN ( RN, ATCL_CMNT_ID, ATCL_ID, UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID, ATCL_CMNT_CTS, EMTICN_NO, DELYN, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, TO_USER_ID, CHILD_YN, LVL, PATH ) AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS RN , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , RGTR_ID AS TO_USER_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT WHERE UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = A.ATCL_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CHILD_YN , 1 AS LVL , TO_CHAR(A.ATCL_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT A WHERE A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID IS NULL AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclId} UNION ALL SELECT B.RN , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.RGTR_ID AS TO_USER_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT WHERE UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = A.ATCL_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CHILD_YN , B.LVL + 1 AS LVL , B.PATH || '>' || TO_CHAR(A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT A INNER JOIN OPNN B ON A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = B.ATCL_CMNT_ID AND A.ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH) AS LINE_NO , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , CASE WHEN A.DELYN = 'Y' THEN 'DELETED' ELSE DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS, 4000) END AS ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.LVL , CASE WHEN A.LVL > 1 THEN (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.TO_USER_ID) ELSE '' END AS toUserNm , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM OPNN A JOIN ( SELECT A.RN , MAX(CASE WHEN CHILD_YN = 'N' THEN LVL ELSE 0 END) AS LVL FROM OPNN A GROUP BY A.RN ) B ON A.RN = B.RN WHERE A.LVL <= B.LVL AND (A.DELYN = 'N' OR A.CHILD_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH
choose.otherwise: WITH OPNN ( RN, ATCL_CMNT_ID, ATCL_ID, UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID, ATCL_CMNT_CTS, EMTICN_NO, DELYN, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, TO_USER_ID, LVL, PATH ) AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS RN , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , RGTR_ID AS TO_USER_ID , 1 AS LVL , TO_CHAR(A.ATCL_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT A WHERE A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID IS NULL AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclId} UNION ALL SELECT B.RN , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.RGTR_ID AS TO_USER_ID , B.LVL + 1 AS LVL , B.PATH || '>' || TO_CHAR(A.FRST_INQ_DTTM) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_CMNT A INNER JOIN OPNN B ON A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID = B.ATCL_CMNT_ID AND A.ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH) AS LINE_NO , A.ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_ATCL_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.EMTICN_NO , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.LVL , CASE WHEN A.LVL > 1 THEN (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.TO_USER_ID) ELSE '' END AS toUserNm , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM OPNN A ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH

mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : BbsCmntDAO.countBbsCmntDelN 설 명 : 미삭제 댓글 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z WHERE Z.DELYN = 'N'
/* SQL ID : BbsCmntDAO.listBbsCmnt 설 명 : 댓글 목록 */
/* SQL ID : BbsCmntDAO.listBbsCmntPaging 설 명 : 댓글 목록 페이징 */
